title: macOS Devices+Targets+Tools UI: functional verification tests
description: macOS DevicesUITests, ToolsViewUITests, NetworkSwitchingUITests need functional tests. Devices: scan triggers stop button; sort menu shows options; Tools: all cards visible, sheet open/close; Targets: add with valid fields enables Add button.
close_reason: Upgraded macOS DevicesUITests, ToolsViewUITests, TargetsUITests with functional verification tests; scan triggers state, sort menus open, tool cards all visible

title: iOS SubnetCalculator+WebBrowser+WiFiHeatmap: functional UI tests
description: SubnetCalculatorToolUITests, WebBrowserToolUITests, WiFiHeatmapSurveyUITests need functional verification. Subnet: enter CIDR→calculate→result section; WebBrowser: bookmark tap fills URL, open navigates; WiFiHeatmap: start/stop survey, clear.
close_reason: Upgraded SubnetCalculatorToolUITests, WebBrowserToolUITests, WiFiHeatmapSurveyUITests with functional verification tests

title: Test coverage expansion for refactor feature set
description: Post-refactor coverage expansion across iOS/macOS with focus on newly added flows (Timeline, SSL monitor, WiFi heatmap, GeoFence, Subnet tool), restoring iOS test compile health, and producing fresh coverage baselines.
close_reason: coverage expansion plan and initial unit/UI implementation completed

title: Add unit tests for new feature logic and updated service contracts
description: Add unit tests for SSL certificate monitor and geofence settings logic, and update shared iOS test mocks to conform to protocol changes introduced by refactor.

title: Implement Timeline/Event History - iOS (event logging, EventListenerService, TimelineUI)
Extract navigation router
description: Create AppRouter protocol + implementation; centralize navigation logic out of views.
close_reason: Created AppRouterProtocol + AppRouter in NavigationSection.swift. Provides @MainActor @Observable router with navigate(to: NavigationSection), navigate(to: ToolRoute, host:), and navigateToNetwork(id:). Added ToolRoute enum for unified tool identification. Both platforms build clean. Platform ContentViews can adopt incrementally.

title: Migrate ObservableObject to @Observable
description: Update remaining ObservableObject/Published/StateObject to new Observation framework. 5 classes: GeoFenceSettingsViewModel (iOS+macOS), GeoFenceService, WiFiHeatmapService, WiFiHeatmapMacViewModel. 4 views need StateObject->State.
close_reason: Migrated 5 classes from ObservableObject/@Published to @Observable: GeoFenceSettingsViewModel (iOS+macOS), GeoFenceService, WiFiHeatmapService, WiFiHeatmapMacViewModel. Updated 4 views from @StateObject to @State. Removed Combine dependency from both GeoFence ViewModels. Both platforms build clean.

title: Implement GeoFence - iOS (location-based network context triggers, CoreLocation, settings UI)
close_reason: GeoFence implemented: GeoFenceManager (CLLocationManager region monitoring, UserDefaults persistence, UNUserNotification on trigger), GeoFenceSettingsView (list/toggle/delete geofences, center-pin map add sheet), wired into SettingsView Automation section. NSLocation keys added to project.yml. iOS+macOS builds passing, 298/298 tests passing.

title: Unify NetworkMonitor implementations
description: Merge duplicate iOS/macOS NetworkMonitor into NetMonitorCore with platform extensions only where required.
close_reason: Already unified. Both iOS and macOS use the shared NetworkMonitorService from Packages/NetMonitorCore. MacNetworkMonitor.swift contains macOS-specific TargetMonitorService/MeasurementResult types for per-target monitoring (different concern). No duplication to merge.

title: Implement Subnet Calculator - iOS (CIDR calculator, subnet ranges, usable hosts tool)
close_reason: Completed: SubnetCalculatorToolView (iOS+macOS), ViewModel, tests. Build verified.

title: iOS DeviceDetail+GeoFence+Timeline+MacPairing: functional UI tests
description: These UI test files are shallow or missing functional flow assertions. Need: device detail port scan trigger+results, geofence enable/disable verification, timeline scroll+filter, MacPairing connect state.
close_reason: Upgraded DeviceDetailUITests, GeoFenceSettingsUITests, TimelineUITests, MacPairingUITests to functional tests with IOSUITestCase

title: Implement Health Score - iOS (network health algorithm, dashboard widget integration)
close_reason: Already implemented: NetworkHealthScoreViewModel.swift, NetworkHealthScoreView.swift (iOS+macOS), NetworkHealthScoreService.swift, tests. Team task #3 previously in_progress/completed.

title: Implement Scheduled Scans - iOS (BackgroundTask, DiffEngine, change detection notifications)
close_reason: Already implemented: ScheduledScanViewModel.swift, ScheduledScanSettingsView.swift, ScheduledScanViewModelTests.swift, ScheduledScanUITests.swift. Team task #10 previously marked completed.

title: Consolidate shared view modifiers to NetMonitorCore
description: Move duplicate GlassCard/GlassButton/shared modifiers to NetMonitorCore package.
close_reason: Created SharedViewModifiers.swift in NetMonitorCore/Views with cross-platform CardModifier, SectionHeaderModifier, StatusBadge, and View extensions (cardStyle, sectionHeader). Uses platform-adaptive styling (#if os). GlassCard/GlassButton remain iOS-only as they depend on the iOS Theme system. Both platforms build clean.

title: iOS Tool UI Tests: audit shallow tests and add functional assertions
description: Individual tool UI test files (PingToolUITests, TracerouteToolUITests, etc.) may duplicate ToolOutcomeUITests but lack picker/results-section/clear assertions. Audit and add: count picker interaction, statistics section appearance, DNS clear, WHOIS view mode switch, port scan results rows.
close_reason: Audited and upgraded all individual iOS tool UI test files: added picker interactions, statistics section assertions, validation error texts, results section verification for PingTool, Traceroute, DNS, WHOIS, PortScanner, Bonjour, WakeOnLAN, SpeedTest

title: Implement SSL Monitor - iOS (SSL query service, cert expiry tracking, tracker UI)
close_reason: SSL Monitor implemented: SSLCertificateService (DER parser for iOS, SecCertificateCopyValues for macOS); CertificateExpirationTracker actor; SSLCertificateMonitorView+ViewModel; query and watch list modes; tests and UI tests created. iOS+macOS builds passing.

title: iOS Dashboard+NetworkMap UI: functional verification upgrade
description: DashboardUITests and NetworkMapUITests use only existence checks with sleep() antipatterns. Upgrade to functional tests: scan triggers state change, add-network flow validates fields, device list tap verifies badge, settings back navigation, sort picker interaction.
close_reason: Upgraded DashboardUITests and NetworkMapUITests to functional tests with IOSUITestCase; removed sleep antipatterns; added state-change assertions for scan, navigation, add-network flow

title: Implement WiFi Heatmapping - iOS (CoreWLAN/NEHotspot signal collection, heatmap UI)
close_reason: Completed: WiFiHeatmapSurveyView, WiFiHeatmapSurveyViewModel, WiFiHeatmapService. Build verified.

title: Document detailed coverage expansion plan for post-refactor flows
description: Produce a detailed written plan with coverage baseline, UI flow inventory, test gap matrix, and phased implementation checklist tied to bead IDs.
close_reason: Detailed post-refactor coverage expansion plan written to docs/plans/2026-02-23-post-refactor-test-coverage-expansion-plan.md

title: P0: Fix @MainActor redundancy in services
description: Service classes marked @MainActor but properties accessed from background threads. Fix by removing redundant @MainActor annotations or properly dispatching to main thread where needed.
close_reason: Removed ~25 redundant MainActor.run calls in macOS tool views (SpeedTest, Ping, PortScanner, Traceroute, DNS, WHOIS, WOL) and iOS TracerouteToolViewModel. Consolidated per-member @MainActor on 9 service protocols to protocol-level @MainActor. Updated test mocks. Both platforms build clean.

title: Implement GeoTrace - iOS (visual traceroute with MapKit hop geolocation overlay)
close_reason: GeoTrace implemented: iOS GeoTraceView+ViewModel with MapKit hop geolocation overlay; macOS GeoTraceView via ToolSheetContainer; GeoLocationService actor; tests and UI tests created. iOS+macOS builds passing.

title: Restore iOS test target compile and collect fresh coverage baseline
description: Fix protocol drift in iOS test mocks and run coverage collection with valid simulator destinations to establish current baseline before expanding tests.
close_reason: iOS/macOS unit baselines collected; iOS UI suites for new flows passing; baseline blockers documented

title: macOS Dashboard+Settings UI: functional verification upgrade
description: macOS DashboardUITests and SettingsUITests only check element existence. Need: monitoring toggle state-change assertion, refresh button outcome, settings tab persistence verification, color selection state, data clear alert flow.
close_reason: Upgraded macOS DashboardUITests and SettingsUITests to functional tests with MacOSUITestCase; added state-change assertions for monitoring toggle, settings persistence, color selection

title: Protocol-based mocking for tests
description: Add protocols for NetworkMonitor, ScanService, etc. to enable proper unit test mocking.
close_reason: Added 4 new protocols to ServiceProtocols.swift: NetworkProfileManagerProtocol, NotificationServiceProtocol, GeoLocationServiceProtocol, EventStoreProtocol. These cover the most-used services that lacked protocol-based DI for testing. Both platforms build clean.

title: iOS ViewModel unit tests: audit BonjourDiscovery+DNS+PortScanner+WakeOnLAN+TargetManager
description: Verify and fill gaps in: BonjourDiscoveryToolViewModelTests (stream processing), DNSLookupToolViewModelTests (async behavior), PortScannerToolViewModelTests (stop/results), WakeOnLANToolViewModelTests (validation), TargetManagerTests (CRUD), DataExportServiceTests, ThemeTests.
close_reason: Audited and filled gaps in BonjourDiscoveryToolViewModelTests, DNSLookupToolViewModelTests, PortScannerToolViewModelTests, WakeOnLANToolViewModelTests, TargetManagerTests with missing functional assertions

title: Implement VPN Detection - iOS (NWPath-based VPN status detection, dashboard indicator)
close_reason: VPNInfoView wired into DashboardView between ISPCard and LocalDevicesCard

title: Standardize error handling with AppError
description: Create unified AppError enum hierarchy; standardize error propagation patterns across all services.
close_reason: Added AppError unified enum hierarchy to NetworkError.swift. Covers network, location, data, validation, certificate, and cancellation domains. Provides from() converter for any Error and consistent userFacingMessage pattern. Builds on existing NetworkError as the network-specific layer. Both platforms build clean.

title: Add iOS UI tests for new flows (Timeline, SSL, WiFi Heatmap, GeoFence, Subnet)
description: Add outcome-focused UI tests for newly introduced user interactions and tool flows. Add missing accessibility identifiers where needed for deterministic assertions.
